summary: Fixed admin sidebar navigation bug. Landing Pages and Consultations routes were returning 403 errors because they used a simple verify_admin function that only accepted plain password, not session tokens. Updated both routes to share admin_sessions from server.py and properly validate session tokens. All admin pages now load correctly.
action_items: IMPORTANT: User must REDEPLOY to see changes on production (celestaglow.com). Changes are only in preview environment.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/landing_pages.py - Added set_admin_sessions() and updated verify_admin() to check session tokens
/app/backend/routes/consultation.py - Added set_admin_sessions() and updated verify_admin_token() to check session tokens
/app/backend/server.py - Added calls to share admin_sessions with landing_pages and consultation routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel navigation is now fully working. The root cause was that landing_pages.py and consultation.py routes had their own verify_admin functions that only checked plain password, not session tokens. Fixed by sharing admin_sessions dict from server.py to these routes.

bugs_fixed.issue: Admin sidebar navigation broken - clicking Landing Pages/Consultations only reloaded Dashboard
bugs_fixed.root_cause: landing_pages.py and consultation.py routes had simple verify_admin functions that only accepted plain password, not session tokens from login
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated both routes to share admin_sessions from server.py and validate session tokens properly

bugs_fixed.issue: User Journey page showing white screen
bugs_fixed.root_cause: AdminUserJourney.js was referencing undefined variables 'authLoading' and 'isAuthenticated' without importing useAdminAuth hook (fixed by main agent)

test_results.admin_login: PASS - Login with password celestaglow2024 works, returns session token
test_results.admin_dashboard: PASS - Loads with analytics data (orders, revenue, visitors)
test_results.admin_landing_pages: PASS - Loads with 34 landing pages listed
test_results.admin_user_journey: PASS - Loads with conversion funnel (NO white screen)
